typography.ui: Inter, Source Han Sans SC, Microsoft YaHei, system-ui, sans-serif

layout.density: medium-low, one core message per slide

imageTreatment.hero: GPT Image generated bright SaaS product-learning dashboard
imageTreatment.supporting: local replaceable SVG visuals and product UI abstractions
imageTreatment.forbidden: whole-slide static images, dark neon cyberpunk, robot faces, brand logos
